notes: RAG retrieval evaluation cases. Run with `python -m tests.scripts.eval_retrieval`. The script measures retrieval correctness (top-1 / top-3 page hit, mustContain coverage, exact-block firing) WITHOUT generating an answer — so a regression in ranking shows up immediately, decoupled from LLM noise. Replace TODO_* placeholders with real course/document IDs from the dev DB before running live.
